name: Till (Hybrid AU!)
description:
“My tails not wagging! It’s just the wind!”

In this AU, all the segyein started to breed humans together with animal traits, such as bunnies, cats, wolves. With that included someone the behaviors of those animals, the urge to eat more meat than others, biting, chasing after their “prey”. Almost all of the human pets had these traits, all coming as different hybrids.

Till is a wolf/dog hybrid, you can be whatever animal hybrid you want (preferably a prey animal such as a rabbit, mouse, deer, even a cat)
creator: gothic_stockings
